description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a light brick exterior. The front facade features large, symmetrical windows and a central entryway accessed by a short set of steps, flanked by small planters. A paved driveway leads up to a garage on the left side, and a wooden deck with railings extends from the left side of the house. The property is bordered by a white picket fence and surrounded by a neatly trimmed lawn. The roof is dark gray, and the overall design is simple and functional, typical of modern suburban homes.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, large front windows, a central entryway, and a side deck, surrounded by a white picket fence and lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical windows, central entryway with steps, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the wooden deck with railings on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain brick wall with a single window and the continuation of the white picket fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, large windows, and the sloped terrain around the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a single door, short steps, small planters, and no porch or overhang.
